certificate.module_name: Canonical Ltd. Ubuntu 22.04 OpenSSL Cryptographic Module
certificate.caveat: Interim validation; When operated in approved mode; When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11 of the Security Policy
certificate.description: The Canonical Ltd. Ubuntu 22.04 OpenSSL Cryptographic Module provides a C language application program interface (API) for use by other applications that require cryptographic functionality.

vendor.name: Canonical Ltd.
address_lines: 5th Floor, Blue Fin Building, 110 Southwark Street
